translation: Thus the Kanesh colony, say to Aqil<gap>, the female slaves, our messenger, every single and the stations: The tablet comes to the City.
As to the tablet in the City that when someone arrives with me in Nēmīlum, Daur, or without my account, the Kanesh colony will receive my tablets.

As for your letter, as you hear our letter, whether he gave it to an express transport of the palace, or he did not give it, as much silver we shall send to me, whether he did not give it to me. Come on, let us write the tablet and then send me word in the tablet and send it to me the messenger.
I sent our tablet to every single and the lady, what much money he gave to the merchant, without word to the man, let the man write to me before the man.
